featured.title: Why South Asians Get Heart Disease Even Without Symptoms
featured.description: Dr. Mandal examines why South Asians face disproportionately high rates of heart disease even without classic warning signs. She outlines the underlying risk factors and the proactive steps that can make a meaningful difference.
